title: Winter Wonderland
description: A nice cozy modpack that aims to perfectly capture the Minecraft winter experience
body:
# Winter Wonderland **A nice cozy modpack that aims to perfectly capture the Minecraft winter experience**
Winter Wonderland is a meticulously curated modpack that takes you on a journey through the enchanting world of Minecraft's winter season. This modpack is not just a collection of mods; it's a carefully crafted experience that immerses you in a cozy, snow-covered environment. The inclusion of sleds, everlasting snow from **Primal Winter**, and a huge variety of new festive items, foods, and decorations from mods like **Snowy Spirit**, **Winterly**, and **Noel** truly bring the holiday spirit to life. The pack enhances immersion with features like **Sound Physics Remastered**, **Presence Footsteps**, and the **Physics Mod**, which even adds realistic snow tracks! Gameplay is deepened with the inclusion of **Farmer's Delight** and its festive add-ons, perfect for surviving the cold. You'll discover new herbs with **Hibernal Herbs** and can cozy up by a **Soothing Campfire**. The world feels more alive with improved structures from **Philips Ruins**, better villagers via **More Villagers**, and the friendly **Snuffles** and Outvoted Mobs from **Friends&Foes**. All this is built on a modern performance foundation, with **Sodium** and **Iris** providing optimization and shader support right out of the box. With **"Winter Wonderland,"** you'll not only enjoy the festive atmosphere but also experience an improved and immersive gameplay experience. It's more than just a modpack; it's a complete overhaul of your Minecraft winter experience.
Full List of Mods - Accessories - Another Furniture - Aquatic Torches - Architectury API - Capes - Chat Heads - Christmas Culinary Decorations - Christmas Delight - Chunks Fade In - Chunky - CIT Resewn - Cloth Config API - Collective - Enhanced Block Entities - Entity Model Features - Entity Texture Features - Fabric API - Fabric Language Kotlin - Farmer's Delight - Friends&Foes - GeckoLib - Hibernal Herbs - Immersive Snow - Indium - Iris Shaders - Kiwi - Lithium - Mod Menu - Moonlight Lib - More Villagers - MrU - Noel - owo-lib - Patchouli - Philips Ruins - Physics Mod Pro - Presence Footsteps - Primal Winter - Rainbow Christmas - Rare Ice - Reese's Sodium Options - Resourceful Lib - Seasons Greetings - Smooth Scrolling Refurbished - Snow! Real Magic! ⛄ - Snowy Leaves Plus - Snowy Spirit - Snuffles - Sodium - Sodium Extra - Soothing Campfires - Sound Physics Remastered - Terra - Villager Names - Winter Overhaul - Winter Stonecutter Miniblock Recipes - Winterly - YetAnotherConfigLib
